title: Surgeon Vacancy at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions!
